dialogueChunks.intro: The harm from {quest_focus_the} has been repaired, and those who suffered have chosen to forgive. It's a fragile peace, but a genuine one.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} has made amends as best they can. {quest_ally} facilitated reconciliation, and {quest_stakes_the} {quest_stakes_is} recovering thanks to your intervention. The community understands now that {quest_threat_the} came from love twisted by fear, not malice.
dialogueChunks.outro: Forgiveness takes courage on all sides. You made it possible by fixing what was broken while emotions ran high. Thank you, {player_name}.

dialogueChunks.intro: The damage from {quest_focus_the} is mended, but the person responsible carries a weight that may never lift. Some mistakes can't be fully undone.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} withdrew from community life. {quest_ally} says they need time. {quest_stakes_The} survived because you stepped in, but the scars from {quest_threat_the} are a reminder that love without wisdom can be as destructive as hate.
dialogueChunks.outro: You did the right thing in an impossible situation, {player_name}. Not every resolution feels like a victory, but this one saved lives.

dialogueChunks.intro: {target_npc} turned their guilt into action. After you resolved {quest_focus_the}, they dedicated themselves to repairing every consequence of {quest_threat_the}, working harder than anyone.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The community has seen the change. {quest_ally} says {target_npc} is not the same person who caused the harm: they've grown from it. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} restored, and the settlement is more compassionate for having weathered this crisis together.
dialogueChunks.outro: Your example inspired their redemption. By solving the problem without judgment, you showed that people can be more than their worst mistake. Well done, {player_name}.
